description: Navigate to a target slide's section during playback with an interactive icon placed on a shape
utility: Create navigation links between slides and sections

arguments.name: targetSlide
arguments.description: Quoted name of the target slide to navigate to

arguments.name: sectionName
arguments.description: Quoted name of the section within the target slide (optional)

arguments.name: shapeRef
arguments.description: Reference to shape where the navigation icon is placed

alternates.variant: Go to slide with icon on shape
alternates.description: Navigate to target slide, place icon on specified shape

alternates.variant: Go to slide section with icon on shape
alternates.description: Navigate to specific section of target slide, place icon on shape
